metadata.description: Travel search plugins for Claude Code. Search flights and hotels with points/miles or cash prices, and track price changes.

plugins.name: pointsyeah-flights
plugins.description: Search award flights bookable with points/miles via PointsYeah. Covers all major airline loyalty programs.

plugins.name: pointsyeah-hotels
plugins.description: Search hotel award availability and pricing via PointsYeah. Compare points prices across Hyatt, Marriott, Hilton, and more.

plugins.name: google-flights
plugins.description: Search cash flight prices via Google Flights with multi-airport, round-trip, separate tickets, and price tracking.

plugins.name: google-hotels
plugins.description: Search Google Hotels with live, date-accurate pricing via reverse-engineered protobuf. No API key or browser needed.
